name: @kagent/agent-workflow-runtime
description: Wave 2 / Workflows host SDK — defineWorkflow + WorkflowContext (spawnAgentTask, awaitSignal, signal, sleep) over Restate's durable execution model. User-supplied workflow images import this package and Restate's TS SDK to register their handlers; the operator's AgentWorkflow controller deploys the image + registers it via Restate's admin API.
author: Chris Knuteson <chris@ctkadvisors.net>
